conbody.p: Overview: The Overdue Clarifications report enables the CDS managers to analyze the summary and detailed information on the clarifications that are overdue and take immediate action.

The report provides answers to the following business questions:
How many clarifications are overdue and require follow-up? Can the physician liaison help?
Which providers have the most overdue clarification instances?
How do I get a list of clarifications that are overdue?
Which CDSs have the most overdue clarifications?
What is the detail around overdue clarifications?
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDS General CDS Productivity Overdue Clarifications .

The Overdue Clarifications report displays the following:
KPI cards: Encounters with Overdue Clarification, Overdue Clarifications, and Overdue Instances
Overdue Clarification Instances by Provider
Overdue Clarification Instances by CDS
Overdue Clarification Instances
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in charts.
For Global filters, refer Filters on all Pages.
Default Display: This report displays the data for all overdue clarifications till date.

entry.p: Displays the count of encounters that have at least one Clarification with the status as Overdue.
Displays the count of clarifications with the status as Overdue. An encounter can have more than one overdue clarification.
The count of ‘Pending’ instances of the Clarifications with the status as Overdue.

p.b: Overdue Clarification - Overdue Clarification Instances by Provider Chart

ul.li: This chart displays the count of overdue clarification instances for each provider.
The provider is the Provider displayed in the ‘Responded By’ field in the Clarification UI.
X-axis: Displays the name of the Responded By provider in the format Dr. Smith, Dennis B, Jr., MD.
Y-axis: Displays the count of the overdue clarification instances.
Info icon (text on hover): Count of overdue clarification instances for each Provider.;Instance Response = Pending.
An overdue clarification can have more than one pending instances.

Sort: Data in the chart is sorted in descending order by the provider with the highest count of overdue clarification instances to the provider with the lowest count of overdue clarification instances.

p.b: Overdue Clarification - Overdue Clarification Instances by CDS Chart

ul.li: This chart displays the count of overdue clarification instances for each Initiating CDS till date.
Initiating CDS is the CDS who sent the clarification.
Format: Bar Chart
X-axis: Displays the name of the initiating CDS in the format CDS ID.
Y-axis: Displays the count of the overdue clarification instances.
Info icon (text on hover): Count of overdue clarification instances for every initiating CDS. ;Instance Response = Pending.
Sort: Data in the chart is sorted in descending order by the CDS with the highest count of overdue clarification instances to the CDS with the lowest count of overdue clarification instances.

p.b: Overdue Clarification - Overdue Clarification Instances Chart

ul.li: This tabular displays the clarification instance details. Each row in this report corresponds to one clarification instance. Total number of rows must be equal to the count of overdue clarification instances.
Info icon (text on hover): Data in this chart is for all overdue clarification instances. ;Encounter Status: Includes all encounter status except Review Not Needed.
Format: Tabular
Sort: Data in the chart is sorted Instance Overdue Since (descending order).

conbody.p:
The following columns are displayed: Overdue Clarification Instances Column and Description
Column Description Formula/Calculation
Facility Displays the Facility description of the facility associated with the encounter.
Account No. Displays the account number of the encounter.
MRN Displays the medical record number of the encounter.
Patient Name The name of the patient associated with the encounter. Patient name is displayed in the format: Last Name, First Name.
Admit Date
Displays the Admit Date and time of the encounter in the facility’s timezone. Format: 07/01/2020 03:58:53 PM ET.
Discharge Date
Displays the Discharge Date and time of the encounter in the facility’s timezone. Format: 07/01/2020 03:58:53 PM ET.
Instance Overdue Since (Hours) Displays the time since the instance is overdue.
Instance Overdue Since = [(Current Date/Time - Instance Sent Date/Time) - Timeframe for overdue clarification] Hours
(OR)
Instance Overdue Since = [(Current Date/Time) - (Instance Sent Date/Time + Timeframe for overdue clarification] Hours
Current Date/Time - The current date and time
Time frame for overdue clarification varies from facility to facility. Instance Overdue Since is displayed in hours. Rounded to 0 Decimal places. Facility Time Zone is considered.
The round off logic to calculate the Instance Overdue Since is as below:
If time (in mins) < 30 mins, round off to previous value. (Example: 11.15 AM --> Round off to 11 AM).
If time (in mins) >= 30 mins, round off to the next value. (Example: 11.32 AM --> Round off to 12 PM).
Initiating CDS Displays the name of the initiating CDS in the format Last Name, First Name (CDS ID).
Follow-Up CDS Displays the name of the Follow-up CDS in the format Last Name, First Name (CDS ID).
Clarification Subject
Displays the subject of the clarification in the format Clarification Code Description.
For example, E871 Hypo-osmolality and hyponatremia.
Generic Clarifications that do not have code are also displayed.
Primary Type
Displays the Primary Type assigned to the clarification. There can only be one primary type assigned to the clarification. (E.g. PDX, CC, etc.). A clarification can have a standard or custom type assigned.
Other Type
Displays the other types assigned to the clarification. Comma-separated values are displayed. There can be more than one other type selected for the clarification. A clarification can have standard or custom other types assigned.
Instance Sent Date
Displays the sent date and time of the clarification instance. Format: 07/01/2020 03:58:53 PM ET.
Instance Response Pending With
Displays the ‘Responded By’ provider associated with the clarification instance. This is the provider with whom the clarification instance is pending. Format: Dr. Smith, Dennis B, Jr., MD.
Instance Response
Displays the response ‘Pending’. Other responses do not apply to this report.

ul.li: Displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order that the report user has access to.
User can select multiple facilities.
Users can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID).
Default: ALL.
Displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities user has access to.
User can select multiple payers
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
Users can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
Displays both active and inactive CDSs in alphabetical order associated with the facilities user has access to.
The CDS Filter in all the reports displays the users with at-least CDS or CDS Manager role assigned.
"Unassigned CDS" displays data for the encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
Default: ALL

row.entry: Displays the name of the provider to whom the clarification instance was sent.

ul.li: Displays the available patient types. E.g. Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available Visit Types.
User can select multiple Visit Types.
Users can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Encounter Statuses.
User can select multiple Encounter Statuses.
Users can search the Encounter Status.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Admit Service.
User can select multiple admit service.
Users can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL

row.entry: Count of encounters that have at least one Clarification with the status as Overdue. ; Encounter Status: Includes all encounter status except Review Not Needed
Count of clarifications with status as Overdue. ;Clarification Status: Includes clarification status as Overdue except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.
Count of Overdue Clarifications with response as Pending. ;Clarification Status: Includes clarification status as Overdue except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.

Time since the clarification instance is Overdue. ;Instance Overdue Since = [(Current Date/Time - Instance Sent Date/Time) - Time frame for overdue clarification] Hours;(Current Date/Time is the current date and time).
